Node.help: Manages the stat catalog and stat views

PropertyNodeList.name: statCatalog
PropertyNodeList.help: List of stats available for the current test

PropertyNode.name: statViewer
PropertyNode.help: List of views selected for the current test

PropertyBoolean.name: dbLogging
PropertyBoolean.description: Whether or not logging stat results to Database.
PropertyBoolean.help: Enable logging of stat results to a DataStore

Struct.name: ResolvedStat
Struct.help: Stat with the stat engine path resolved

Member.name: tag
Member.help: ID in string format to distinguish a specific stat to resolve

Member.name: statPathList
Member.help: List of possible choices in a filter category

Struct.name: StatFilter
Struct.help: A filter applied to the statistic. The source application may define one or more filters you can select from. If you select a filter, only the values for the statistic that pass through that filter are displayed. For example, if you are configuring a statistic for packets transmitted and the source application allows you to filter for a particular port, such as port 1.1.1, the graph will only display the packets transmitted from port 1.1.1.

Member.name: name
Member.help: The name of a filter category (exampes: communities, networks, ports)

Member.name: valueList
Member.help: List of possible choices in a filter category

Struct.name: AggregatedStat
Struct.help: A specific stat being aggregated with StatSpec and StatFilter selection

Member.name: tag
Member.help: ID in string format to distinguish a unique stat to resolve the StatEngine paths

Member.name: statSourceType
Member.help: Stat source type of the aggregated stat

Member.name: statName
Member.help: Stat name of the aggregated stat

Member.name: filters
Member.help: Selected filters of the aggregated stat

Struct.name: AggregatedStatInfo
Struct.help: A specific stat being aggregated with StatSpec and StatFilter selection with array stat

Member.name: tag
Member.help: ID in string format to distinguish a unique stat to resolve the StatEngine paths

Member.name: statSourceType
Member.help: Stat source type in the StatCatalog

Member.name: statName
Member.help: Stat name in the StatCatalog

Member.name: statType
Member.help: The type of stat, array or not array

Member.name: index
Member.help: First index of array stats

Member.name: indexLast
Member.help: Last index of array stats

Member.name: filters
Member.help: StatFilter selection fo rthis particular stat

Method2.name: ElapsedTime
Method2.help: Returns the elapsed time since start of Test.

Argument.name: elapsedTime
Argument.help: The elapsed time since start of Test.

Method2.name: CommitCatalog
Method2.help: Select view templates to match statistic sources in the catalog.

Method2.name: RegisterStatEnginePaths
Method2.help: Register stat engine paths resolved by a client application from the aggregated stat list

Argument.name: resolvedStatList
Argument.help: The resolved stat engine paths to register

Method2.name: GetRegisteredStatEnginePaths
Method2.help: Get the registered stat engine paths that were resolved by a client application

Argument.name: resolvedStatList
Argument.help: The list of resolved stat engine paths

Method2.name: GetAggregatedStatList
Method2.help: Get the aggregated stat descriptions for stat engine path resolution by a client application

Argument.name: aggregatedStatList
Argument.help: The list of aggregated stat descriptions for stat engine path resolution by a client application

Method2.name: GetAggregatedStatInfoList
Method2.help: Get the aggregated stat descriptions with array support for stat engine path resolution by a client application

Argument.name: aggregatedStatInfoList
Argument.help: The list of aggregated stat with array support descriptions for stat engine path resolution by a client application

Struct.name: PgidRange
Struct.help: Range of Packet Group IDs from IxOS hardware

Member.name: firstIndex
Member.help: First index of range of Packet Group IDs from IxOS hardware

Member.name: lastIndex
Member.help: Last index of range of Packet Group IDs from IxOS hardware

Struct.name: StreamInfo
Struct.help: Describe a stream with PGID and tx/Rx ports

Member.name: id
Member.help: Unique ID within a particular port

Member.name: lineRate
Member.help: Line speed rate frames per second

Member.name: txPort
Member.help: Physical Tx port

Member.name: rxPortList
Member.help: List of physical Rx ports used by this stream

Member.name: pgidRangeList
Member.help: List of PGIDs used by this stream

Member.name: pgid
Member.help: Packet Group ID

Member.name: name
Member.help: Flow Name

Method2.name: SetStreamFlowInfo
Method2.help: Set stream table and PGID label map for a publisher

Argument.name: publisher
Argument.help: Name of the application that is setting the stream info

Argument.name: streamTable
Argument.help: List of streams

Argument.name: name
Argument.help: The name of a remote StatPublisher to register

Argument.name: name
Argument.help: The name of a remote StatPublisher to deregister

Method2.name: UpdateStatCatalog
Method2.help: Notify StatManager that particular StatPublisher has finished the catalog updating

Argument.name: eventId
Argument.help: Event ID that has been sent out by StatManager to request the StatCatalog updating or a negative vlaue indicates the application ahs updated the StatCatalog spontaniously

Argument.name: publisher
Argument.help: name of the paplication that has updated the StatCatalog

Argument.name: success
Argument.help: Whether the updating is successful

Method2.name: ResolveAggregatedStat
Method2.help: Resolve StatEngine paths for a aggregated stat

Argument.name: eventId
Argument.help: The event ID originally sent by Statmanager to resolve this StatEngine path

Argument.name: publisher
Argument.help: The name of the StatPublisher that has resolved this stat

Event.name: CatalogUpdateEvent
Event.help: Event to request applications to populate StatCatalog

Argument.name: id
Argument.help: Event ID used by applciation to send out completion notification

Argument.name: publisher
Argument.help: Name of the StatPublisher that will be responsible to publish the catalog

Node.Event:
> Event to request applications to resolve StatEngine paths
Event ID used by applciation to send out completion notification
Name of the StatPublisher that will be responsible to resolve the path
The stat that needs to be resolved. It includes StatPec and StatFilterGroup information

Argument.name: name
Argument.help: The name of the buildin StatPublisher

Argument.name: enable
Argument.help: Enable or Disable request

Event.name: LogStatsEvent
Event.help: Event sent to StatViewer to log stats

Argument.name: name
Argument.help: The name of the StatView

Argument.name: statSetList
Argument.help: A list of stat value updates and changes

Event.name: ClearStatsEvent
Event.help: Event sent to StatViewer to clear stats

Argument.name: name
Argument.help: The name of the StatView

Event.name: CatalogChangeEvent
Event.help: Event to noftify clients that StatCatalog has been modified

Argument.name: id
Argument.help: Event ID used by appilcation to track the changing

Member.name: caption
Member.help: StatView caption

Member.name: action
Member.help: StatView change action

Method2.name: CommitViewChange
Method2.help: Notify StatManager that particular StatPublisher has modified StatView list

Argument.name: changeList
Argument.help: A list of StatView change actions

Event.name: ViewChangeEvent
Event.help: Event to noftify clients that StatView list has been modified

Argument.name: id
Argument.help: Event ID used by appilcation to track the changing

Argument.name: changeList
Argument.help: A list of StatView change actions
